channel.title: family-friendly-meat-dishes Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh family-friendly-meat-dishes posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: One Pot Creamy Chicken and Rice Comfort Dinner That Feels Like a Warm Hug
item.description: This one pot creamy chicken and rice dinner is pure comfort on a plate. The secret’s in the slow simmer that makes the rice perfectly tender and the chicken juicy. Great for cozy weeknights when you want something easy and satisfying.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 tablespoon olive oil, room temperature
  • 1 pound boneless skinless chicken thighs, cut into bite-sized pieces
  • 1 small onion, finely chopped
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup long grain white rice, rinsed
  • 2 1/2 cups chicken broth, preferably low sodium
  • 1/2 cup heavy cream
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 1 teaspoon dried thyme
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Fresh parsley, chopped, for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #tablespoon #pound #small

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: One Pot Creamy Chicken and Rice Comfort Dinner That Feels Like a Warm Hug
media:content.media:description: This one pot creamy chicken and rice dinner is pure comfort on a plate. The secret’s in the slow simmer that makes the rice perfectly tender and the chicken juicy. Great for cozy weeknights when you want something easy and satisfying.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, tablespoon, pound, small

item.title: Creamy Garlic Parmesan Chicken with Mushrooms Dinner That’s Simply Irresistible
item.description: This creamy garlic parmesan chicken is a total weeknight winner. Tender chicken smothered in a luscious mushroom cream sauce that’s rich but not heavy. I love serving it with mashed potatoes or crusty bread to soak up every last drop!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 boneless skinless chicken breasts, pounded to even thickness
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 3 tablespoons unsalted butter
  • 8 ounces cremini mushrooms, sliced
  • 4 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup chicken broth
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 1 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese
  • 1 teaspoon dried thyme
  • Fresh parsley, chopped, for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #freshly #olive

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Garlic Parmesan Chicken with Mushrooms Dinner That’s Simply Irresistible
media:content.media:description: This creamy garlic parmesan chicken is a total weeknight winner. Tender chicken smothered in a luscious mushroom cream sauce that’s rich but not heavy. I love serving it with mashed potatoes or crusty bread to soak up every last drop!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Mediumpost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, freshly, olive

item.title: Easy Sheet Pan Chicken and Veggies for Busy Weeknights
item.description: This sheet pan chicken and veggies recipe is a lifesaver on hectic evenings. The chicken stays juicy thanks to a simple marinade, and roasting everything together means minimal cleanup. Great for dinner any night you want comfort without fuss!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 boneless skinless chicken breasts, trimmed
  • 1/4 cup olive oil, divided
  • 2 tablespoons lemon juice
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 teaspoon dried oregano
  • Salt and pepper, to taste
  • 2 cups baby carrots
  • 1 red bell pepper, sliced
  • 1 zucchini, sliced
  • 1 red onion, cut into wedges

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #olive #lemon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy Sheet Pan Chicken and Veggies for Busy Weeknights
media:content.media:description: This sheet pan chicken and veggies recipe is a lifesaver on hectic evenings. The chicken stays juicy thanks to a simple marinade, and roasting everything together means minimal cleanup. Great for dinner any night you want comfort without fuss!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, olive, lemon

item.title: Hearty Chicken and Rice Casserole That Feels Like a Warm Hug
item.description: This chicken and rice casserole is my go-to for busy nights when I want something comforting but easy. The creamy sauce and tender chicken make it feel like a warm hug on a plate. Perfect for family dinners!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups cooked chicken, shredded or diced
  • 1 1/2 cups uncooked long grain white rice
  • 3 cups chicken broth, warm
  • 1 cup sour cream, room temperature
  • 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese
  • 1/2 cup diced onion
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1/2 teaspoon salt
  • 1/4 teaspoon black pepper
  • 1/2 teaspoon dried thyme
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #cooked #uncooked #chicken

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Hearty Chicken and Rice Casserole That Feels Like a Warm Hug
media:content.media:description: This chicken and rice casserole is my go-to for busy nights when I want something comforting but easy. The creamy sauce and tender chicken make it feel like a warm hug on a plate. Perfect for family dinners!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, cooked, uncooked, chicken

item.title: Creamy Garlic Parmesan Chicken Skillet Dinner for Cozy Weeknights
item.description: This skillet chicken is comfort food at its best—juicy chicken breasts in a garlicky, creamy Parmesan sauce. The splash of cream and fresh Parmesan takes it over the top. Perfect for busy, chilly evenings!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 boneless skinless chicken breasts, patted dry
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 4 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 3/4 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese
  • 1/2 cup chicken broth
  • 1 teaspoon dried Italian herbs
  • Fresh parsley, chopped for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #freshly #olive

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Garlic Parmesan Chicken Skillet Dinner for Cozy Weeknights
media:content.media:description: This skillet chicken is comfort food at its best—juicy chicken breasts in a garlicky, creamy Parmesan sauce. The splash of cream and fresh Parmesan takes it over the top. Perfect for busy, chilly evenings!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, freshly, olive

item.title: Sheet Pan Garlic Butter Chicken with Roasted Veggies for Easy Dinners
item.description: This sheet pan garlic butter chicken is the ultimate easy dinner hack. Juicy chicken and tender roasted veggies bathed in a buttery garlic sauce come together in one pan. Perfect for nights when you want hearty but simple food!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs, about 1.5 pounds
  • 3 tablespoons unsalted butter, melted
  • 4 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 teaspoon smoked paprika
  • 1 teaspoon dried thyme
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1 pound baby potatoes, halved
  • 1 cup baby carrots
  • 1 cup green beans, trimmed
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • Fresh parsley, chopped for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #bonein #unsalted #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Sheet Pan Garlic Butter Chicken with Roasted Veggies for Easy Dinners
media:content.media:description: This sheet pan garlic butter chicken is the ultimate easy dinner hack. Juicy chicken and tender roasted veggies bathed in a buttery garlic sauce come together in one pan. Perfect for nights when you want hearty but simple food!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, bonein, unsalted, cloves

item.title: One-Pot Creamy Chicken and Mushroom Pasta for Cozy Weeknights
item.description: This creamy chicken and mushroom pasta is my go-to for nights when I want comfort food without fuss. Cooking everything in one pot lets the flavors blend beautifully. Perfect for a cozy dinner after a long day!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, room temperature
  • 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into bite-sized pieces
  • 8 ounces cremini mushrooms, sliced
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 small onion, finely chopped
  • 1 teaspoon dried thyme
  • 1/2 teaspoon salt
  • 1/4 teaspoon black pepper
  • 2 cups chicken broth
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 8 ounces penne pasta, uncooked
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • Fresh parsley, chopped, for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #olive #pound #cremini

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

item.title: One Pan Garlic Butter Chicken with Crispy Potatoes for an Easy Weeknight Meal
item.description: This one pan garlic butter chicken is juicy and tender, paired with crispy golden potatoes all soaked in a rich, buttery garlic sauce. It’s a simple, cozy dinner that’s perfect for busy weeknights or anytime you want comfort food without fuss.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs, about 1.5 pounds
  • 1.5 pounds baby potatoes, halved
  • 4 tablespoons unsalted butter, divided
  • 5 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 teaspoon dried thyme
  • 1 teaspoon smoked paprika
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • Fresh parsley, chopped for garnish (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.description: This cozy one-pot dinner features tender chicken and baby potatoes simmered in a dreamy garlic cream sauce. It’s super simple, with easy cleanup, making it perfect for busy weeknights or relaxed weekends.

item.title: Crispy Airfryer Garlic Parmesan Chicken Wings Ready in 20 Minutes
item.description: These garlic parmesan chicken wings are crispy, flavorful, and come together in just 20 minutes using the airfryer. The secret? A light coating of parmesan that crisps up perfectly. Great for game day or a quick dinner!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 pounds chicken wings, split and tips removed, patted dry
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon garlic powder
  • 1/2 teaspoon salt
  • 1/2 teaspoon black pepper
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley (optional)
  • 1 tablespoon melted butter
  • 1 teaspoon dried Italian seasoning

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Crispy Airfryer Chicken Thighs with Garlic Butter Finish
item.description: These chicken thighs get perfectly crispy in the airfryer, then finish with a rich garlic butter glaze that locks in juicy flavor. Super quick and great for busy weeknights or casual dinners with friends.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

  • 1 teaspoon garlic powder

item.title: One-Pan Lemon Herb Chicken That’s Perfect for Busy Weeknights
item.description: This one-pan lemon herb chicken is my quick fix for busy evenings. Fresh lemon juice and fragrant herbs make it bright and flavorful, and it’s all done in one skillet. Great for a cozy dinner when you want something light but satisfying.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 boneless skinless chicken breasts
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 lemon, juiced and zested
  • 1 teaspoon dried oregano
  • 1 teaspoon dried thyme
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
  • Fresh parsley, chopped (for garnish)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Easy Sheet Pan Chicken Dinner with Roasted Veggies for Busy Nights
item.description: This sheet pan chicken dinner is my go-to for busy weeknights. Roasting chicken and veggies together locks in flavor and makes cleanup a breeze. It’s colorful, hearty, and perfect when you want a wholesome meal without fuss.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 boneless, skinless chicken thighs
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon smoked paprika
  • 1 teaspoon garlic powder
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1 red bell pepper, cut into strips
  • 1 yellow bell pepper, cut into strips
  • 1 small red onion, cut into wedges
  • 1 zucchini, sliced into half-moons
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes
  • Fresh parsley, for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Creamy Garlic Chicken with Spinach - Hearty, Healthy, and Easy Dinner
item.description: This creamy garlic chicken is packed with protein and vibrant spinach, making it a hearty yet healthy dinner. The secret? A luscious garlic cream sauce that's rich without being heavy. Perfect for a cozy weeknight meal!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 boneless skinless chicken breasts, pounded to even thickness
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 4 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup chicken broth
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 3 cups fresh spinach, roughly chopped
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1 teaspoon dried Italian herbs

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Crispy Honey-Spiced Chicken Wings Perfect for Game Night
item.description: These wings are crispy on the outside and juicy inside, tossed in a sticky, spicy honey glaze that hits the perfect sweet-heat balance. Ready in under 45 minutes, they're perfect for casual dinners or game nights!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 pounds chicken wings, whole or separated
  • 1 teaspoon kosher salt
  • 1/2 teaspoon black pepper
  • 1 teaspoon smoked paprika
  • 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder
  • 1 tablespoon baking powder (not baking soda), for crispiness
  • 1/3 cup honey
  • 2 tablespoons hot sauce (adjust to taste)
  • 1 tablespoon soy sauce
  • 1 teaspoon apple cider vinegar
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Mediumpost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #chicken #teaspoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: These wings are crispy on the outside and juicy inside, tossed in a sticky, spicy honey glaze that hits the perfect sweet-heat balance. Ready in under 45 minutes, they're perfect for casual dinners or game nights!

item.title: Juicy Marinated Chicken Dinner Bowls with Crisp Veggies for Easy Weeknight Meals
item.description: These chicken bowls are my go-to for busy nights. The marinade locks in juiciness while the veggies stay perfectly crisp. Super easy to prep ahead and great for lunch or dinner!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1.5 lbs boneless, skinless chicken thighs, trimmed
  • 3 tablespoons olive oil
  • 2 tablespoons soy sauce
  • 1 tablespoon honey
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 teaspoon smoked paprika
  • 1 teaspoon ground cumin
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 2 cups cooked brown rice or quinoa
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1 cup cucumber, diced
  • 1 cup shredded carrots
  • 1 avocado, sliced
  • Fresh cilantro or parsley for garnish
  • Lime wedges for serving

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #olive #sauce

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:description: These chicken bowls are my go-to for busy nights. The marinade locks in juiciness while the veggies stay perfectly crisp. Super easy to prep ahead and great for lunch or dinner!

item.title: Crispy Airfryer Chicken Thighs with Garlic Herb Butter Sauce
item.description: These chicken thighs get perfectly crispy in the airfryer and finish with a rich garlic herb butter that locks in juiciness. Super quick and full of flavor, they’re perfect for a cozy weeknight dinner.

item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1/2 teaspoon black pepper
  • 1 teaspoon smoked paprika

media:content.media:title: Crispy Airfryer Chicken Thighs with Garlic Herb Butter Sauce
media:content.media:description: These chicken thighs get perfectly crispy in the airfryer and finish with a rich garlic herb butter that locks in juiciness. Super quick and full of flavor, they’re perfect for a cozy weeknight dinner.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761229889885, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, bonein, teaspoon

item.title: Creamy Spinach Chicken Skillet Dinner That’s Ready in 45 Minutes
item.description: This creamy chicken skillet is the perfect weeknight meal—rich sauce, tender chicken, and fresh spinach all in one pan. The secret's in the sauce that clings beautifully, making every bite cozy and satisfying.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 boneless skinless chicken breasts, pounded to even thickness
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup chicken broth, low sodium
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
  • 4 cups fresh spinach, washed and roughly chopped
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1 teaspoon dried Italian herbs
  • 1 tablespoon butter

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761229889885 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #olive #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: This creamy chicken skillet is the perfect weeknight meal—rich sauce, tender chicken, and fresh spinach all in one pan. The secret's in the sauce that clings beautifully, making every bite cozy and satisfying.

item.title: Juicy Lemon Pepper Chicken Thighs Airfryer Recipe for Crispy, Tender Perfection
item.description: These lemon pepper chicken thighs come out crispy on the outside and juicy inside thanks to the airfryer magic. The zesty seasoning is simple but packs a punch. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner or anytime you crave something flavorful but fuss-free.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 8 bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs, cold
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 tablespoon lemon pepper seasoning
  • 1 teaspoon garlic powder
  • 1 teaspoon smoked paprika
  • 1/2 teaspoon salt
  • Fresh lemon wedges for serving
  • Chopped fresh parsley for garnish (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Easy Sheet Pan Chicken Thighs with Sweet Potatoes for Busy Nights
item.description: This sheet pan chicken dinner is the ultimate no-fuss meal—juicy thighs paired with sweet potatoes and simple spices. It’s perfect for busy evenings when you want something hearty and comforting without a ton of cleanup.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 6 bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs, patted dry
  • 2 large sweet potatoes, peeled and cut into 1-inch cubes
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon smoked paprika
  • 1 teaspoon garlic powder
  • 1/2 teaspoon dried thyme
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Fresh parsley, chopped (optional, for garnish)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Easy Sheet Pan Chicken Thighs with Rosemary and Lemon for Busy Nights
item.description: This sheet pan chicken is a total lifesaver when you want dinner fast but still crave fresh flavors. The lemon brightens everything up, and rosemary gives it that cozy, earthy vibe. Great for weeknight meals!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 8 bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs, cold
  • 3 tablespoons olive oil, extra virgin
  • 2 teaspoons kosher salt
  • 1 teaspoon freshly ground black pepper
  • 3 sprigs fresh rosemary, chopped
  • 1 lemon, zested and juiced
  • 1 red bell pepper, sliced
  • 1 yellow bell pepper, sliced
  • 1 small red onion, cut into wedges
  • 2 cups baby potatoes, halved

item.title: One-Pot Spaghetti Bolognese That’s Easy, Cozy, and Budget Friendly
item.description: This one-pot spaghetti bolognese is a total lifesaver on hectic weeknights. It’s packed with rich, slow-simmered flavors but only needs one pan and simple ingredients. Perfect for family dinners when you want comfort without the fuss!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, room temperature
  • 1 medium onion, finely chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 pound ground beef, lean
  • 1 can (14 oz) crushed tomatoes
  • 2 tablespoons tomato paste
  • 1 cup beef broth
  • 1 teaspoon dried oregano
  • 1 teaspoon dried basil
  • Salt and black pepper, to taste
  • 8 ounces spaghetti, broken in half
  • Grated Parmesan cheese, for serving
  • Fresh basil leaves, optional garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Creamy Lemon Garlic Chicken with Fresh Spring Asparagus for Cozy Dinners
item.description: This creamy lemon garlic chicken is a bright, cozy dinner that feels fresh thanks to tender spring asparagus. The garlic-infused sauce adds warmth and depth, making it a perfect weekend treat or easy weeknight meal.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1.5 lbs boneless skinless chicken breasts, pounded to even thickness
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 4 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup chicken broth
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • Zest and juice of 1 large lemon
  • 1 bunch fresh asparagus, trimmed and cut into 2-inch pieces
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 2 tablespoons unsalted butter
  • Fresh parsley, chopped for garnish

item.title: One-Pan Roasted Chicken with Spring Veggies for Easy Weeknight Dinners
item.description: This one-pan chicken dinner is such a lifesaver on busy nights. Roasting chicken alongside fresh spring veggies lets all the flavors mingle beautifully. Perfect for a cozy, fuss-free meal!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs, about 1.5 pounds
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, divided
  • 1 pound baby potatoes, halved
  • 1 bunch asparagus, trimmed and cut into 2-inch pieces
  • 1 cup baby carrots
  • 4 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1 teaspoon dried thyme
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1 lemon, sliced
  • Fresh parsley, chopped (for garnish)

item.title: Zesty Herb-Roasted Chicken with Spring Vegetables for Cozy Dinners
item.description: This roasted chicken is brightened with fresh lemon and herbs, paired with tender spring veggies roasted all together. It’s a quick, flavorful dinner that feels special but is super simple—ideal for busy weeknights!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 whole chicken (about 3-4 lbs), patted dry
  • 2 lemons, 1 sliced, 1 juiced
  • 3 tbsp olive oil
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tbsp fresh rosemary, chopped
  • 1 tbsp fresh thyme leaves
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1 lb baby potatoes, halved
  • 1 cup baby carrots
  • 1 cup asparagus, trimmed
  • 1/2 cup pearl onions, peeled

item.title: Creamy Garlic Parmesan Chicken with Roasted Spring Veggies for Cozy Dinners
item.description: This creamy garlic parmesan chicken is juicy and full of flavor, perfectly paired with slow-roasted spring veggies that bring a sweet crunch. I love serving this for a comforting weekend meal!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 boneless skinless chicken breasts, patted dry
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, divided
  • 4 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 cup heavy cream
  • 1/2 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese
  • 1 teaspoon dried Italian seasoning
  • 1 pound mixed spring vegetables (e.g., asparagus, baby carrots, snap peas), trimmed
  • 1 tablespoon fresh parsley, chopped (optional, for garnish)

item.title: Sweet and Savory Honey Garlic Meatballs with Veggies for Busy Nights
item.description: These honey garlic meatballs are a total winner for quick dinners. The sauce balances sweet and savory perfectly, and adding veggies makes it feel wholesome. Great for a cozy weeknight when you want comfort without fuss.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pound ground beef, fresh
  • 1/2 cup breadcrumbs, plain
  • 1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese, fresh
  • 1 large egg, beaten
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1/4 cup milk, whole
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 2 cups broccoli florets, fresh
  • 1 red bell pepper, sliced
  • 1/3 cup honey, pure
  • 1/4 cup soy sauce, low sodium
  • 2 tablespoons apple cider vinegar
  • 1 tablespoon cornstarch
  • 1/4 cup water
  • Salt and black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions
